creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Joe, can you run this patch through poudriere?

I've handled quite a few of your PRs now and I've not had a single one that didn't have significant problems.  I'd like to see poudriere logs on all the outstandings PRs.

I'm sorry if it sounds a bit harsh, but I'm pretty much demanding this of all new ports and staging PRs now.  The new policy has really saved the committers a lot of work tbh.
